mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article_reading_history (id, user_id, article_id, title_snapshot, first_read_at, last_read_at, read_count, progress_percent, scroll_y, anchor_id, anchor_offset, article_updated_at_snapshot, position_updated_at, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, deleted, version) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{articleId}, #{titleSnapshot}, #{now}, #{now}, 1, 0, 0, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, #{username}, #{now}, #{username}, #{now}, 0, 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE title_snapshot = IF(deleted = 1 OR VALUES(last_read_at) >= last_read_at, VALUES(title_snapshot), title_snapshot), first_read_at = IF(deleted = 1, VALUES(first_read_at), first_read_at), last_read_at = IF(deleted = 1, VALUES(last_read_at), GREATEST(last_read_at, VALUES(last_read_at))), read_count = IF(deleted = 1, 1, read_count + 1), progress_percent = if(deleted = 1, 0, progress_percent), scroll_y = if(deleted = 1, 0, scroll_y), anchor_id = if(deleted = 1, NULL, anchor_id), anchor_offset = if(deleted = 1, NULL, anchor_offset), article_updated_at_snapshot = if(deleted = 1, NULL, article_updated_at_snapshot), position_updated_at = if(deleted = 1, NULL, position_updated_at), updated_by = VALUES(updated_by), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at), version = version + 1, deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT h.id AS history_id, h.article_id, h.title_snapshot, h.first_read_at, h.last_read_at, h.read_count, h.progress_percent, h.scroll_y, h.anchor_id, h.anchor_offset, h.article_updated_at_snapshot, h.position_updated_at, a.updated_at AS article_updated_at, CASE WHEN a.id IS NOT NULL AND a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 'published' AND (a.visibility = 'public' OR a.visibility IS NULL) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS available FROM article_reading_history h LEFT JOIN article a ON a.id = h.article_id WHERE h.user_id = #{userId} AND h.deleted = 0 ORDER BY h.last_read_at DESC, h.id DESC

SELECT h.id AS history_id, h.article_id, h.title_snapshot, h.first_read_at, h.last_read_at, h.read_count, h.progress_percent, h.scroll_y, h.anchor_id, h.anchor_offset, h.article_updated_at_snapshot, h.position_updated_at, a.updated_at AS article_updated_at, 1 AS available FROM article_reading_history h INNER JOIN article a ON a.id = h.article_id WHERE h.user_id = #{userId} AND h.deleted = 0 AND a.id IS NOT NULL AND a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 'published' AND (a.visibility = 'public' OR a.visibility IS NULL) ORDER BY h.last_read_at DESC, h.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT h.id AS history_id, h.article_id, h.title_snapshot, h.first_read_at, h.last_read_at, h.read_count, h.progress_percent, h.scroll_y, h.anchor_id, h.anchor_offset, h.article_updated_at_snapshot, h.position_updated_at, a.updated_at AS article_updated_at, CASE WHEN a.id IS NOT NULL AND a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 'published' AND (a.visibility = 'public' OR a.visibility IS NULL) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS available FROM article_reading_history h LEFT JOIN article a ON a.id = h.article_id WHERE h.user_id = #{userId} AND h.article_id = #{articleId} AND h.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE article_reading_history h INNER JOIN article a ON a.id = h.article_id AND a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 'published' AND (a.visibility = 'public' OR a.visibility IS NULL) SET h.progress_percent = #{progressPercent}, h.scroll_y = #{scrollY}, h.anchor_id = #{anchorId}, h.anchor_offset = #{anchorOffset}, h.article_updated_at_snapshot = #{articleUpdatedAt}, h.position_updated_at = #{now}, h.updated_by = #{username}, h.updated_at = #{now}, h.version = h.version + 1 WHERE h.user_id = #{userId} AND h.article_id = #{articleId} AND h.deleted = 0
UPDATE article_reading_history SET deleted = 1, updated_by = #{username}, updated_at = #{now}, version = version + 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND article_id = #{articleId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE article_reading_history SET deleted = 1, updated_by = #{username}, updated_at = #{now}, version = version + 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
